name: Lois's Country Crunch Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. This chewy loaf is Lois's favorite.
2. In the ZO, she had better results when she baked it on the Regular Cycle rather than the French Bread cycle.
3. Original recipe used 1/2 tsp butter or margarine. I use Wonderslim to reduce the fat content.
4. Place all ingredients in bread pan and press Start.
5. After the baking cycle ends, remove bread from pan, place on cake rack, and allow to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
Variations:
1. Place dough ingredients in bread pan, select Dough setting, and press Start.
2. When the dough has risen long enough, the machine will beep. Turn off bread machine, remove bread pan, and turn out dough onto a lightly floured countertop or cutting board. Shape dough into a 15-inch log.
3. Sprinkle a cookie sheet with cornmeal. Place dough on cookie sheet and brush with some olive oil. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
4. Remove from refrigerator, uncover, let stand at room temperature for one hour.
5. Make 3 diagonal cuts with a sharp knife.
6. Preheat oven to 425°F. Bake 25 - 30 minutes until golden brown. Remove from oven and cool on cake rack.
